name: AST-Bench V2
title: Agent Schema Tax Benchmark V2 — Shape Diversity

lanes.label: MongoDB
lanes.modelingRule: database-native document model shaped around product access patterns

lanes.label: Postgres
lanes.modelingRule: database-native normalized relational model with credible table boundaries

promotionTiers.label: Case study
promotionTiers.publicClaim: One captured comparison may be shown as seed evidence only.

promotionTiers.label: Pilot benchmark
promotionTiers.publicClaim: Directional aggregate claims are allowed with visible caveats.

fairnessRules: Same business prompt per compared pair.
Same acceptance assertions per compared pair.
Same agent and version per compared pair.
Same repeat count per compared pair.
Database-native models are allowed and required.
Generated fixture records are deterministic and versioned.
No test edits, fixture edits, or human rescue inside an accepted run.
Failures, retries, timeouts, and mixed metrics remain visible.
Cost projections separate measured deltas from assumptions.
Postgres schema must be idiomatic best-practice normalization, not a strawman.

outcome.title: Strategic account rescue
outcome.businessPrompt: Add an at-risk customer escalation workflow for a delayed high-value order at a strategic account. Combine account tier, contract, support, invoice, usage, shipment, regulatory, and audit context. Route Customer Success, Legal, Finance, and Support. Show a customer-safe portal state and preserve a full audit timeline.
outcome.expectedOutcome: At-risk escalation active with executive recovery owner routing and customer-visible audit history.
